rows.label: ES/NQ
rows.signal: Cheap vs 20D mean; wait for confirmation.
rows.expression: Buy ES / sell NQ when the spread re-enters from below the band.
rows.risk: Avoid premature fades when Nasdaq momentum persists.

rows.label: RTY/ES
rows.signal: Cheap but requires rates and credit confirmation.
rows.expression: Buy RTY / sell ES only if rates and credit do not deteriorate.
rows.risk: Small-cap cheap can stay cheap in risk-off regimes.

rows.label: YM/ES
rows.expression: Long YM / short ES if Dow leadership confirms.
rows.risk: Often defensive value, not true risk-on.

playbookRows.interpretation: Small caps outperform while Nasdaq underperforms. Broadening or domestic cyclicals.
playbookRows.risk: Watch rates and credit. This can reverse violently on hawkish shocks.

playbookRows.interpretation: Small caps lag while Nasdaq leads. Narrow mega-cap growth regime.
playbookRows.risk: Momentum can persist. Avoid premature fades.

playbookRows.interpretation: Value, cyclicals, and small caps all improving.
playbookRows.expression: Long YM and RTY basket / short ES
playbookRows.risk: Confirm with market breadth and regional banks.

playbookRows.interpretation: Dow/value outperforms, but small-cap credit beta remains suspect.
playbookRows.risk: Often defensive value, not true risk-on.

playbookRows.interpretation: Nasdaq and S&P growth leadership over Dow value.
playbookRows.risk: Size carefully around earnings concentration in mega-cap tech.

productRows.label: S&P versus Nasdaq
productRows.nuance: Tracks broad market versus mega-cap growth leadership.

productRows.label: Russell versus S&P
productRows.nuance: Most sensitive to credit, rates, regional banks, and domestic cyclical tone.

productRows.label: Dow versus S&P
productRows.nuance: Can be defensive value, so confirm with breadth before calling it risk-on.

tradePlanRows.title: Entry
tradePlanRows.body: Enter at +/-1.5 ATR only when macro regime, GOOSE direction, and live spread signal agree.

tradePlanRows.title: Layering
tradePlanRows.body: Use three clips: 40% at trigger, 30% at extension, 30% only after stabilization.

tradePlanRows.title: Exit
tradePlanRows.body: Take 1/3 at the rolling mean, another 1/3 at +0.5 ATR, and trail the final 1/3.

riskChecklistRows.control: Measure dollar delta by leg and rebalance when index levels move materially.
When combining spreads, net all ES legs before sizing.
Use ATR percentile to reduce size above the 80th percentile.
Stop buying small-cap weakness if rates and credit both deteriorate.
Use legging settings conservatively around data releases and cash open.
